div.p: This case-sensitive code system https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSReferralTypeCS defines the following codes:

tr.td: The patient independently initiated contact with the ACCESS Model participant to request services through the ACCESS Model.
A healthcare provider identified the patient as a potential candidate for the ACCESS Model.
The patient was reached through direct marketing, advertising, or outreach campaigns specifically designed to promote awareness of the participant’s services through the ACCESS Model.

description.value: This codesystem defines codes that indicate how the patient was referred to the ACCESS Model.

copyright.value: Copyright (c) 2026 Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS).

definition.value: The patient independently initiated contact with the ACCESS Model participant to request services through the ACCESS Model.
A healthcare provider identified the patient as a potential candidate for the ACCESS Model.
The patient was reached through direct marketing, advertising, or outreach campaigns specifically designed to promote awareness of the participant’s services through the ACCESS Model.
